{{Expand}}

{{Infobox location
| name = Sunken Tower
| introduced = Waybound
}}

== Waybound ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">2</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|The [[Sunken Tower]] has thirty floors containing many facilities and pocket worlds.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c23">''Waybound'', chapter 23</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|The [[Sunken Tower]] contains a [[construct]] in charge of it.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c23" />}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|“Set the evacuation alarm,” Northstrider commanded the construct in charge of the Sunken Tower.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c23" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Locations]]
[[Category:Waybound]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle locations]]
[[Category:Structures]]
